mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, m.name, m.description, m.price, m.cost, m.is_available AS isAvailable FROM menus m LEFT JOIN categories c ON m.category_id = c.id WHERE m.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT m.id, m.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, m.name, m.description, m.price, m.cost, m.is_available AS isAvailable FROM menus m LEFT JOIN categories c ON m.category_id = c.id ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT m.id, m.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, m.name, m.description, m.price, m.cost, m.is_available AS isAvailable FROM menus m LEFT JOIN categories c ON m.category_id = c.id ORDER BY m.id DESC
SELECT id, name FROM categories ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus (category_id, name, description, price, cost, is_available) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{cost}, #{isAvailable})
mapper.update: UPDATE menus SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, cost = #{cost}, is_available = #{isAvailable} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.category_id AS categoryId, c.name AS categoryName, m.name, m.description, m.price, m.cost, m.is_available AS isAvailable FROM menus m LEFT JOIN categories c ON m.category_id = c.id WHERE m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY m.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menus WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
